mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(o.ORDER_DATE, 'MM/DD') AS day, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, NVL(SUM(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT), 0) AS totalAmount FROM ORDERS o WHERE o.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND o.ORDER_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 14 AND o.ORDER_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(o.ORDER_DATE, 'MM/DD'), TRUNC(o.ORDER_DATE) ORDER BY TRUNC(o.ORDER_DATE) ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank, p.PLACE_ID AS placeId, p.PLACE_NAME AS placeName, p.ADDRESS AS address, p.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, COUNT(*) AS reservationCount FROM RESERVATION r INNER JOIN ROOM rm ON r.ROOM_ID = rm.ROOM_ID INNER JOIN PLACE p ON rm.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE r.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND r.CHECK_IN_DATE >= SYSDATE - 30 GROUP BY p.PLACE_ID, p.PLACE_NAME, p.ADDRESS, p.IMAGE_URL ) WHERE rank <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT t.TRIP_ID) DESC) AS rank, MIN(r.REGION_ID) AS regionId, r.SIDO_NAME AS regionName, COUNT(DISTINCT t.TRIP_ID) AS tripCount FROM TRIP t /* CITIES 문자열에 sido_name이 포함된 region 매칭 */ INNER JOIN REGION r ON INSTR(t.CITIES, r.SIDO_NAME) > 0 AND r.API_SIGUNGU_CODE IS NULL WHERE t.CITIES IS NOT NULL GROUP BY r.SIDO_NAME ) WHERE rank <= 5

SELECT cr.CHAT_ROOM_ID AS roomId, NVL(m2.NICKNAME, m1.USERNAME) AS memberNickname, TO_CHAR(cr.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, ROUND((SYSDATE - CAST(cr.CREATED_AT AS DATE)) * 24) AS waitingHours, last_msg.CONTENT AS lastMessage FROM CHAT_ROOM cr /* 마지막 메시지 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cm.ROOM_ID, cm.CONTENT, cm.MEMBER_ID FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm WHERE cm.CREATED_AT = ( SELECT MAX(cm2.CREATED_AT) FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm2 WHERE cm2.ROOM_ID = cm.ROOM_ID ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) last_msg ON last_msg.ROOM_ID = cr.CHAT_ROOM_ID /* 마지막 발신자 롤 확인 */ LEFT JOIN MEMBER1 last_sender ON last_sender.MEMBER_ID = last_msg.MEMBER_ID /* 채팅방 개설 유저 (가장 먼저 입장한 NORMAL 멤버) */ INNER JOIN CHAT_MEMBER cm_user ON cm_user.CHAT_ROOM_ID = cr.CHAT_ROOM_ID AND cm_user.ADMIN_STATUS = 'NORMAL' AND cm_user.JOINED_AT = ( SELECT MIN(s.JOINED_AT) FROM CHAT_MEMBER s WHERE s.CHAT_ROOM_ID = cr.CHAT_ROOM_ID AND s.ADMIN_STATUS = 'NORMAL' ) INNER JOIN MEMBER1 m1 ON m1.MEMBER_ID = cm_user.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER2 m2 ON m2.MEMBER_ID = cm_user.MEMBER_ID WHERE cr.CHAT_ROOM_TYPE = 'SUPPORT' AND cr.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' /* 마지막 메시지가 없거나, 마지막 발신자가 관리자가 아니면 미답변 */ AND (last_msg.MEMBER_ID IS NULL OR NVL(last_sender.ROLE, 'ROLE_USER') != 'ROLE_ADMIN') ORDER BY cr.CREATED_AT ASC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.PARTNER_ID AS memberId, p.PARTNER_NAME AS username, p.CONTACT_EMAIL AS email, p.CONTACT_NAME AS loginId, TO_CHAR(p.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM ( SELECT p2.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY p2.BUSINESS_NUMBER ORDER BY p2.CREATED_AT DESC ) AS rn FROM PARTNER p2 ) p JOIN ( SELECT ps.PARTNER_ID, ps.STATUS_CODE FROM ( SELECT ps2.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ps2.PARTNER_ID ORDER BY ps2.PARTNER_STATUS_ID DESC ) AS rn FROM PARTNER_STATUS ps2 ) ps WHERE ps.rn = 1 ) latest_status ON latest_status.PARTNER_ID = p.PARTNER_ID WHERE p.rn = 1 AND latest_status.STATUS_CODE = 'PENDING' ORDER BY p.CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m1.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, NVL(m2.NICKNAME, m1.USERNAME) AS nickname, m1.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, COUNT(r.REPORT_ID) AS reportCount, NVL(ms_cur.STATUS_CODE, 1) AS statusCode FROM REPORT r INNER JOIN MEMBER1 m1 ON r.TARGET_ID = m1.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER2 m2 ON m1.MEMBER_ID = m2.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, STATUS_CODE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY MEMBER_ID ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC) AS rn FROM MEMBERSTATUS ) ms_cur ON ms_cur.MEMBER_ID = m1.MEMBER_ID AND ms_cur.rn = 1 WHERE m1.STATUS = 1 /* 탈퇴(STATUS=0) 제외, 활성 유저만 */ GROUP BY m1.MEMBER_ID, m2.NICKNAME, m1.USERNAME, m1.LOGIN_ID, ms_cur.STATUS_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(r.REPORT_ID) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
